description: sprintf/strcpy/strcat called with only hardcoded string literals — no taint source.

expected.notes: sprintf(buf, ...) is a dangerous function even with constant args — AST pattern match is correct.
strcpy(buf, "constant value") is a dangerous function even with constant args — AST pattern match is correct.
strcat(buf, " appended") is a dangerous function even with constant args — AST pattern match is correct.
